indicators.name: China Official Statement Tone Shift
indicators.what_to_watch: MFA daily briefings and Xi Jinping speeches — tone toward US, Taiwan, and neighbors
indicators.why_matters: Tone hardening signals policy change 2-4 weeks ahead

indicators.name: US National Security Statement
indicators.what_to_watch: White House, State Department, Pentagon official releases on China and Russia
indicators.why_matters: Policy signals before action — often 1-3 weeks ahead

indicators.name: Russia Strategic Statement
indicators.what_to_watch: Kremlin and MFA Russia statements on NATO, Ukraine, and nuclear posture
indicators.why_matters: Escalation language precedes military moves

indicators.name: NATO Unity Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: Joint statements, summit outcomes, member disagreements
indicators.why_matters: Cracks in NATO unity = opportunity signal for adversaries

indicators.name: EU Foreign Policy Move
indicators.what_to_watch: EU Council decisions on sanctions, trade, and geopolitical positioning
indicators.why_matters: EU economic weight makes its moves market-moving

indicators.name: India Strategic Positioning
indicators.what_to_watch: India-China, India-US, India-Russia relations — hedging behavior
indicators.why_matters: India as swing power — which side it leans matters globally

indicators.name: Taiwan Strait Tension Level
indicators.what_to_watch: PLA military activity near Taiwan, US arms sales, diplomatic statements
indicators.why_matters: Taiwan is the highest-risk flashpoint globally

indicators.name: South China Sea Activity
indicators.what_to_watch: Naval incidents, island construction, ASEAN protests, US FON operations
indicators.why_matters: Escalation here affects global shipping and ASEAN stability

indicators.name: Middle East Power Shift
indicators.what_to_watch: Iran nuclear talks, Saudi-Israel normalization, proxy conflict levels
indicators.why_matters: Middle East instability directly affects oil and global inflation

indicators.name: ASEAN Alignment Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: ASEAN summit outcomes, member hedging between US and China
indicators.why_matters: ASEAN alignment shows which power is winning in Southeast Asia

indicators.name: Japan-South Korea Security Move
indicators.what_to_watch: Trilateral US-Japan-South Korea cooperation, North Korea response
indicators.why_matters: Northeast Asia security directly tied to US-China competition

indicators.name: Australia Strategic Posture
indicators.what_to_watch: AUKUS developments, Australia-China trade, Five Eyes signals
indicators.why_matters: Australia is key US ally in Indo-Pacific balance

indicators.name: AI Capability Breakthrough
indicators.what_to_watch: New AI model releases, benchmark scores, capability jumps from OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, Chinese labs
indicators.why_matters: AI capability shifts change military, economic, and intelligence balance

indicators.name: Semiconductor Export Control
indicators.what_to_watch: US BIS export control updates, chip restrictions on China, Dutch ASML decisions
indicators.why_matters: Chip restrictions are the frontline of US-China tech war

indicators.name: Quantum Computing Milestone
indicators.what_to_watch: Government quantum funding, breakthrough papers, qubit count records
indicators.why_matters: Quantum breakthrough breaks current encryption — civilization-level event

indicators.name: Cyber Attack Attribution
indicators.what_to_watch: State-attributed cyber attacks on infrastructure, government, finance
indicators.why_matters: Cyber attacks are precursor to or substitute for kinetic conflict

indicators.name: Space Technology Move
indicators.what_to_watch: Satellite launches, anti-satellite tests, space militarization signals
indicators.why_matters: Space dominance = intelligence, GPS, and military communication dominance

indicators.name: AI Military Integration
indicators.what_to_watch: Pentagon AI programs, Chinese PLA AI announcements, autonomous weapons
indicators.why_matters: AI in military changes speed and nature of conflict

indicators.name: Tech Decoupling Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: Supply chain bifurcation, friend-shoring announcements, tech standard battles
indicators.why_matters: Decoupling reshapes global economy into two tech blocs

indicators.name: US Federal Reserve Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: Fed rate decisions, chair speeches, FOMC minutes
indicators.why_matters: Fed moves ripple through every global market within hours

indicators.name: New Sanctions Package
indicators.what_to_watch: OFAC designations, EU sanctions lists, secondary sanctions threats
indicators.why_matters: Sanctions are financial warfare — direct economic impact

indicators.name: Sanctions Evasion Detection
indicators.what_to_watch: Shell company formations, alternative payment systems, crypto flows
indicators.why_matters: Evasion routes show how targets adapt and survive sanctions

indicators.name: De-dollarization Move
indicators.what_to_watch: Yuan internationalization, BRICS currency talks, SWIFT alternatives
indicators.why_matters: Dollar dominance = US financial power — any erosion matters

indicators.name: Crypto Regulatory Move
indicators.what_to_watch: SEC crypto actions, PBOC digital yuan, EU MiCA implementation
indicators.why_matters: Crypto regulation shapes how sanctions can be evaded or enforced

indicators.name: Oil Price Spike or Drop
indicators.what_to_watch: OPEC production decisions, US strategic reserve moves, Russia oil revenue
indicators.why_matters: Oil price = inflation = political stability worldwide

indicators.name: Trade War Escalation
indicators.what_to_watch: New tariffs, trade restrictions, WTO disputes
indicators.why_matters: Trade war = economic decoupling signal + inflation pressure

indicators.name: Large Scale Military Exercise
indicators.what_to_watch: PLA exercises near Taiwan, NATO exercises near Russia, US Indo-Pacific drills
indicators.why_matters: Exercises signal intent and test readiness — often precede escalation

indicators.name: Arms Sale Announcement
indicators.what_to_watch: US arms sales to Taiwan, Japan, Ukraine — Russian and Chinese arms deals
indicators.why_matters: Arms sales show alliance commitments and shift military balance

indicators.name: Nuclear Posture Change
indicators.what_to_watch: Nuclear doctrine updates, warhead count changes, delivery system tests
indicators.why_matters: Nuclear posture shifts are the highest-stakes signals

indicators.name: Active Conflict Intensity
indicators.what_to_watch: Ukraine frontline changes, Middle East conflict levels, Asia flashpoints
indicators.why_matters: Active conflicts draw in great powers and reshape alliances

indicators.name: Military Budget Announcement
indicators.what_to_watch: Defense budget increases — especially China, US, NATO members
indicators.why_matters: Budget reveals long-term military intent

indicators.name: State Media Tone Shift
indicators.what_to_watch: Global Times, People's Daily, RT, VOA — sudden tone or framing changes
indicators.why_matters: State media shifts signal policy changes before official announcements

indicators.name: Coordinated Influence Operation
indicators.what_to_watch: Detected bot networks, coordinated inauthentic behavior, platform takedowns
indicators.why_matters: Influence ops precede or accompany physical operations

indicators.name: Disinformation Campaign Detection
indicators.what_to_watch: Fact-checker findings, platform removals, false narrative spread patterns
indicators.why_matters: Disinformation shapes public opinion before policy can respond

indicators.name: Think Tank Consensus Shift
indicators.what_to_watch: RAND, CSIS, Brookings, IISS major papers — new framing of great power competition
indicators.why_matters: Think tanks shape policy 6-18 months ahead

indicators.name: Global Media Coverage Spike
indicators.what_to_watch: Sudden surge in coverage of specific topic across multiple outlets
indicators.why_matters: Media spike = attention shift = political pressure building

indicators.name: New Alliance Formation
indicators.what_to_watch: New security pacts, minilaterals (AUKUS, QUAD expansion), partnership upgrades
indicators.why_matters: New alliances reshape balance of power

indicators.name: Proxy Actor Activation
indicators.what_to_watch: Hezbollah, Houthis, Wagner-type groups — sudden activation or new funding
indicators.why_matters: Proxy activation = state actor testing limits without direct involvement

indicators.name: Non-State Actor Movement
indicators.what_to_watch: Major NGO position shifts, international court filings, civil society mobilization
indicators.why_matters: Non-state actors shape norms and create political pressure

indicators.name: Elite Personal Network Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: Davos, Bilderberg, G7/G20 side meetings — who meets whom privately
indicators.why_matters: Elite meetings precede policy announcements by weeks

indicators.name: Hidden Financial Network Detection
indicators.what_to_watch: Leaked documents, ICIJ investigations, shell company registrations
indicators.why_matters: Hidden money flows reveal real alliances and intentions

indicators.name: Rare Earth Export Restriction
indicators.what_to_watch: China rare earth export quotas, new restrictions on gallium, germanium, lithium
indicators.why_matters: China controls 60-80% of rare earth processing — restrictions hit tech globally

indicators.name: Energy Supply Disruption
indicators.what_to_watch: Pipeline disruptions, LNG supply changes, energy weaponization signals
indicators.why_matters: Energy is the most direct lever of geopolitical pressure

indicators.name: Food Security Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: Grain export restrictions, wheat and rice price spikes, drought reports
indicators.why_matters: Food insecurity causes political instability within 6-12 months

indicators.name: Supply Chain Rerouting
indicators.what_to_watch: Friend-shoring announcements, new manufacturing hub formations, port activity shifts
indicators.why_matters: Supply chain rerouting = long-term economic realignment

indicators.name: Critical Mineral Competition
indicators.what_to_watch: Lithium, cobalt, nickel deals — who secures what mining rights where
indicators.why_matters: Critical minerals = battery tech = EV and military supply chain control
